task_details: food_id food_011 appears in 5/7 plans. Force rotation.
rationale: food_011 (הודו / Turkey Breast) appears in 12 of the 20 most recent plan files, consistently slotted in breakfast — the current planner only looks back 3 plans for its recently_used exclusion set, which is too narrow to prevent a high-frequency food from dominating across the weekly cycle. With the queue down to a single task and recent verdicts showing 4 approvals and 1 uncertain (no rejects), this is the right moment to address root-cause planner variety logic.

After the change, running the planner against the existing food catalog produces a new plan where food_011 is absent from the meal that food_011 most recently occupied (breakfast) — verified by inspecting the generated plan JSON
food_011 appearance rate across any sliding window of 7 consecutive generated plans does not exceed 2 occurrences (i.e. <= 2/7), enforced by the expanded recently_used window
